body:
## Type

bug

## Target

skills/pdf-lab, tau-tracked pdf_oxide NIST second-pass lane

## Target paths

- skills/pdf-lab, tau-tracked pdf_oxide NIST second-pass lane

## Current state

In the post-table-false-positive live 10-page reviewer run, pages 31, 32, 33, 34, and 401 still report footnote typing, continuation, citation-token corruption, and unknown-region findings: p31-footnotes-typed-unknown, p31-footnote20-continuation-split, p31-footnote-citation-text-corruption, p32-footnotes-unknown-region, p32-footnote-reference-token-corruption, p33-footnote-unknown, p34-footnote-classification, and p401_footnote_unknown_region.

## Requested outcome

NIST footnotes in the sampled pages should materialize as explicit footnote/reference-note elements with intact citation text and continuation grouping, not unknown_region, paragraph fragments, corrupted citation tokens, or table artifacts.

## Required proof

Live reviewer summary: /mnt/storage12tb/pi-mono/artifacts/pdf-lab/ten-page-random-toc-elements-20260630/live_second_pass_review_after_table_fp_patch/summary.json. Required repair proof: focused deterministic tests for footnote typing/continuation/citation preservation, real PDF extraction snapshots for pages 31, 32, 33, 34, and 401, and rerun of the same 10-page live packet showing the listed footnote finding IDs absent while all pages return raw_ok:true. mocked:no live:yes for the reviewer proof.

## Route

backend_python_or_skill_runtime

## Maintainer route

backend_python_or_skill_runtime

## Requested repair agent

agent-skill-maintainer

## Non-goals

No unrelated refactors or scope expansion.

## Ticket type details

- **Observed failure:** In the post-table-false-positive live 10-page reviewer run, pages 31, 32, 33, 34, and 401 still report footnote typing, continuation, citation-token corruption, and unknown-region findings: p31-footnotes-typed-unknown, p31-footnote20-continuation-split, p31-footnote-citation-text-corruption, p32-footnotes-unknown-region, p32-footnote-reference-token-corruption, p33-footnote-unknown, p34-footnote-classification, and p401_footnote_unknown_region.
- **Expected behavior:** NIST footnotes in the sampled pages should materialize as explicit footnote/reference-note elements with intact citation text and continuation grouping, not unknown_region, paragraph fragments, corrupted citation tokens, or table artifacts.
- **Reproduction or artifact:** Use the existing packet /mnt/storage12tb/pi-mono/artifacts/pdf-lab/ten-page-random-toc-elements-20260630/review_packet and run: cd /home/graham/workspace/experiments/pdf_oxide && uv run python scripts/pdf_lab/run_next30_agentic_second_pass.py --packet /mnt/storage12tb/pi-mono/artifacts/pdf-lab/ten-page-random-toc-elements-20260630/review_packet --out /mnt/storage12tb/pi-mono/artifacts/pdf-lab/ten-page-random-toc-elements-20260630/live_second_pass_review_after_table_fp_patch --pages 20 468 401 415 483 34 31 32 33 23 --model gpt-5.5 --concurrency 1 --timeout 420 --retries 1 --batch-id ten-page-random-toc-elements-20260630-after-table-fp-patch

<!-- ticket-skill
type: bug
target: skills/pdf-lab, tau-tracked pdf_oxide NIST second-pass lane
route: backend_python_or_skill_runtime
agent: agent-skill-maintainer
-->

This ticket must be resolved under `best-practices-github-ticket`. Closure requires deterministic proof; WebGPT review or CI green alone is not closure proof.

comments.body:
<!-- agent-lease
agent: agent-skill-maintainer
lease_id: 20260630T142609Z-agent-skill-maintainer-72
issue: 72
-->

Lease: maintainer-active by agent-skill-maintainer.
Scope: one ticket.
Closure requirement: deterministic proof comment before close.

# Ticket #72 Proof: NIST footnote typing, continuation, and citation preservation

Issue: https://github.com/grahama1970/agent-skills/issues/72

## Scope

Resolved the #72 footnote-specific findings from the post-table-false-positive 10-page NIST packet:

- `p31-footnotes-typed-unknown`
- `p31-footnote20-continuation-split`
- `p31-footnote-citation-text-corruption`
- `p32-footnotes-unknown-region`
- `p32-footnote-reference-token-corruption`
- `p33-footnote-unknown`
- `p34-footnote-classification`
- `p401_footnote_unknown_region`

Residual non-footnote findings remain in the live reviewer summary and are not claimed here:

- `p33_bullets_as_paragraphs`
- `p34-inline-citation-hyphen-wrap-space`
- `p401-reference-continuations-as-paragraphs`
- `p401-gray-band-heading-as-paragraph`

## Patch Evidence

Relevant modified pdf_oxide files:

- `/home/graham/workspace/experiments/pdf_oxide/scripts/pdf_lab/snapshot_current_extraction.py`
- `/home/graham/workspace/experiments/pdf_oxide/tests/test_pdf_lab_snapshot_current_extraction.py`

Behavior changed:

- Materialize Rust/classifier `Footnote` source blocks as `type: footnote` instead of `unknown_region`.
- Prefer overlapping PyMuPDF text lines for footnote text when classifier text corrupts bracketed citation tokens such as `[SP 800-53A]`.
- Merge adjacent unnumbered footnote continuation lines into the preceding numbered footnote with `raw.continuation_ids`.
- Preserve duplicate text-line geometry matching so repeated page text maps to the block-nearest line.

## Deterministic Checks

```bash
uv run pytest -q \
  tests/test_nist_footnote_preset.py \
  tests/test_pdf_lab_snapshot_current_extraction.py::test_block_elements_preserve_rust_footnote_type_for_candidate_inference \
  tests/test_pdf_lab_snapshot_current_extraction.py::test_block_elements_use_overlapping_footnote_lines_when_rust_text_corrupts_citation \
  tests/test_pdf_lab_snapshot_current_extraction.py::test_merge_footnote_continuation_lines_into_numbered_note \
  tests/test_pdf_lab_snapshot_current_extraction.py::test_block_elements_choose_duplicate_text_line_by_block_geometry \
  tests/test_nist_table_duplicate_suppression.py
```

Result:

```text
17 passed in 0.24s
```

```bash
uv run python -m py_compile scripts/pdf_lab/snapshot_current_extraction.py
```

Result: exit code 0.

## Real Snapshot Evidence

Fresh real PDF snapshots were generated from:

`/mnt/storage12tb/extractor_corpus/source/standards/NIST_SP_800-53r5.pdf`

Artifact root:

`/mnt/storage12tb/pi-mono/artifacts/pdf-lab/ten-page-random-toc-elements-20260630/ticket72_footnote_patch_snapshot_20260630T1428`

Commands exited 0 for pages 31, 32, 33, 34, and 401.

Snapshot summary:

```text
page 31: footnote_count=6, unknown_count=0, corrupt_token_count=0, continuation_ids on actual:p31:block:15 -> actual:p31:block:16
page 32: footnote_count=2, unknown_count=0, corrupt_token_count=0, continuation_ids on actual:p32:block:14 -> actual:p32:block:15
page 33: footnote_count=1, unknown_count=0, corrupt_token_count=0
page 34: footnote_count=1, unknown_count=0, continuation_ids on actual:p34:block:13 -> actual:p34:block:14
page 401: footnote_count=1, unknown_count=0, corrupt_token_count=0, continuation_ids on actual:p401:block:32 -> actual:p401:block:33
```

Snapshot artifacts:

- `/mnt/storage12tb/pi-mono/artifacts/pdf-lab/ten-page-random-toc-elements-20260630/ticket72_footnote_patch_snapshot_20260630T1428/page_0031.json`
- `/mnt/storage12tb/pi-mono/artifacts/pdf-lab/ten-page-random-toc-elements-20260630/ticket72_footnote_patch_snapshot_20260630T1428/page_0032.json`
- `/mnt/storage12tb/pi-mono/artifacts/pdf-lab/ten-page-random-toc-elements-20260630/ticket72_footnote_patch_snapshot_20260630T1428/page_0033.json`
- `/mnt/storage12tb/pi-mono/artifacts/pdf-lab/ten-page-random-toc-elements-20260630/ticket72_footnote_patch_snapshot_20260630T1428/page_0034.json`
- `/mnt/storage12tb/pi-mono/artifacts/pdf-lab/ten-page-random-toc-elements-20260630/ticket72_footnote_patch_snapshot_20260630T1428/page_0401.json`

## Live Reviewer Evidence

Command:

```bash
uv run python scripts/pdf_lab/run_next30_agentic_second_pass.py \
  --packet /mnt/storage12tb/pi-mono/artifacts/pdf-lab/ten-page-random-toc-elements-20260630/review_packet \
  --out /mnt/storage12tb/pi-mono/artifacts/pdf-lab/ten-page-random-toc-elements-20260630/live_second_pass_review_ticket72_footnote_patch_20260630T1438 \
  --pages 20 468 401 415 483 34 31 32 33 23 \
  --model gpt-5.5 \
  --concurrency 1 \
  --timeout 420 \
  --retries 1 \
  --batch-id ticket72-footnote-patch-20260630T1438
```

Result:

```text
exit code: 0
schema: pdf_oxide.next30_agentic_second_pass.summary.v1
page_count: 10
raw_ok_count: 10
ok_count: 10
finding_count: 4
human_needed_count: 0
target_72_ids_present: []
```

Live artifacts:

- Summary: `/mnt/storage12tb/pi-mono/artifacts/pdf-lab/ten-page-random-toc-elements-20260630/live_second_pass_review_ticket72_footnote_patch_20260630T1438/summary.json`
- Per-page outputs: `/mnt/storage12tb/pi-mono/artifacts/pdf-lab/ten-page-random-toc-elements-20260630/live_second_pass_review_ticket72_footnote_patch_20260630T1438/pages/page_*/`

All 10 per-page `validation.json` files reported `ok: true`.

## Proof Boundary

- `mocked: no` for real snapshots and live reviewer rerun.
- `live: yes` for the 10-page reviewer proof through Scillm/model path.
- Focused pytest is deterministic local regression coverage, not live model proof.
- This does not prove unrelated bullet-list, inline citation wrapping, reference-continuation, or gray-band-heading findings.

labels.name: route:backend_python_or_skill_runtime

title: pdf_oxide NIST footnotes remain unknown or corrupted after false-table repair
